meta.title: Receipt Invoice Generator Claude Audit Pack
meta.created_for: Claude audit and improvement pass before implementation
meta.important_note: This pack is for audit and implementation planning. It intentionally does not create the production app yet.

audit_instruction_for_claude.primary_task: Audit this plan deeply, identify gaps, risks, missing requirements, and propose improvements without changing locked user decisions unless justified.
audit_angles: Check whether document scope is sufficient for Malaysia SME and global use.
Check whether data model supports invoice, quotation, DO, receipt, payment, refund, credit note, debit note, purchase order, cash bill, and voucher workflows.
Check whether numbering policy is collision-safe and strictly per company and per document type.
Check whether PDF renderer approach can match Excel-style templates while keeping maintainable HTML/CSS templates.
Check whether Telegram plus DeepSeek workflow is safe and cannot bypass user confirmation.
Check whether e-Invoice metadata is enough for later MyInvois integration.
Check whether Tencent Ubuntu deployment is secure, maintainable, backed up, and observable.
Check whether template audit separated canonical company formats from mixed sample sheets correctly.
expected_output_from_claude: A revised plan with clear improvements and no ambiguity for implementers.
A risk register with severity and mitigation.
A missing-info checklist grouped by company and workflow.
Recommended implementation phase ordering and acceptance gates.
Any proposed schema or API changes that reduce future rework.
do_not_do: Do not treat historical Excel records as production imports.
Do not merge company numbering or template identity.
Do not redesign all document templates unless user later asks.
Do not require full MyInvois submission in v1.

locked_user_decisions.historical_excel_policy: Template reference only, not imported as production records.
locked_user_decisions.document_design_policy: Match plus kemas: preserve original design identity while improving spacing, typos, table consistency, and polish.
locked_user_decisions.company_isolation: Every company has separate profile, templates, records, numbering, and sequences.
locked_user_decisions.numbering_issue_rule: Official numbers are generated only when a document is issued, not while it is a draft.
locked_user_decisions.einvoice_v1_scope: Metadata-ready only. MyInvois submission/signing/cancel/reject is not part of v1.
locked_user_decisions.no_cross_company_numbering: Wehdah, Persada, Virtue Damsel, and Nas Ceria numbering must never share one sequence.
locked_user_decisions.workspace_state: Current workspace is empty, so build a new system rather than refactor an existing app.

project_goal.summary: Build a premium multi-company receipt, invoice, delivery order, quotation, and related business document generator to replace messy Excel workflows.
business_problem: Excel files are saved across different PCs, causing scattered records and inconsistent document numbers.
Invoice, quotation, receipt, DO, and artwork references are hard to search and verify.
Multiple companies require independent formats and independent numbering.
success_definition: User can choose company, document type, customer, items, payment details, optional artwork, then generate A4 PDF or 60mm thermal receipt.
All issued documents are searchable, immutable, and safely numbered per company/document type/year.
Company details, logo, stamp, signature, bank details, footer terms, templates, and numbering rules are editable.
Telegram and API flows create drafts and require confirmation before issue.

target_server.recommended_runtime: Docker Compose on Ubuntu with Nginx reverse proxy, Certbot SSL, PostgreSQL, Redis, PHP-FPM, Laravel Horizon, and queue workers.

current_workspace_state.observed_state: Workspace was empty before creating this handoff bundle.
current_workspace_state.source_code_status: No app source files yet. The implementation phase should scaffold a new project.

18 sheets; Wehdah Lao UI/Rockwell template family; many artwork pages; A4 invoice plus artwork confirmation layouts.
15 sheets; same Wehdah template family; ARTWORK sheet with invoice and artwork continuation pages.
16 sheets; Wehdah templates; includes recent artwork examples I-241207 and I-250110.
2 artwork sheets; Wehdah invoice layout with dense embedded artwork images.

reference_files.audit_note: 16 sheets; active Wehdah MUBZ quotation/invoice examples plus A To Z blank templates for DO, cash bill, PO, notes, receipt, voucher.

reference_files.document_family: Wehdah quotation/invoice plus blank billing templates duplicate/reference
reference_files.audit_note: 16 sheets; parsed structure matches QUOTATION MUBZ (1); keep as supplied reference for comparison.

reference_files.document_family: Wehdah issued invoice PDF with artwork page
reference_files.audit_note: 2 pages; page 1 invoice, page 2 artwork page; page size 1020x1320 pt; exact PDF output target for artwork attachment workflow.

reference_files.document_family: Persada workbook with mixed template sheets
reference_files.audit_note: 13 sheets; canonical Persada billing sheet is INV 1; other sheets contain A To Z, Virtue, or Wehdah data and must not be treated as Persada canonical.
PNG transparent stamp/chop; 294x296; blue company stamp with registration number.
A4 letterhead background; 4963x7019; header logo/contact block, gradient bar, footer steps.

nas_ceria.style: Vertex42-derived quote/invoice style, Arial fonts, pale headers, thin borders, 0.5 inch margins.
nas_ceria.caution: Contains old sheets, hidden sheets, inventory/costing sheets, and messy numbering. Use as design reference only.

wehdah.style: Lao UI/Rockwell invoice/quotation family with dark blue title fills, structured item table, bank line, terms, signature/chop area.
wehdah.artwork_pattern: A4 invoice page followed by artwork page with thumbnails/captions and confirmation/sign-chop block.

persada.style: Navy/green brand, logo/contact header, Persada stamp, optional full A4 letterhead background.
persada.caution: Only INV 1 is canonical in workbook. Other sheets contain mixed A To Z, Virtue, and Wehdah data.

canonical_sources: Mixed sheet in PERSADA GEMILANG GLOBAL.xlsx
virtue_damsel.status: Partial only. Needs user-confirmed logo, stamp, bank, address, TIN/SST, and final template rules.

generic_a_to_z.status: Template reference only. Not a company profile by default.

companies.name: Wehdah Solution
special_features: artwork attachment pages for printing/design jobs
missing_info: final canonical address spelling Unit vs Unite

companies.name: Persada Gemilang Global
address_observed_letterhead: Jalan Taman Seri Sentosa Taman Seri Sentosa
companies.template_family: Persada navy/green brand with letterhead and stamp
missing_info: whether website appears on billing PDFs

numbering_policy.sequence_display_default: YY plus 3 digits, e.g. 26001 for first 2026 document
numbering_policy.draft_policy: Drafts have internal draft_id only. Final number is allocated inside a DB transaction when issued.
collision_control: DB unique constraint on company_id, document_type, issue_year, document_number
Row lock sequence counter during issue
numbering_policy.manual_override: Admin may set starting number before first issue for a company/type/year. Overrides after issue require audit log and no duplicate allowed.
numbering_policy.legacy_numbers: Old Excel numbers are stored only as design examples, not used to calculate next production number unless user explicitly decides later.

draft: Editable fields, no official number, preview watermark optional, attachments allowed
issue: Validate required fields, allocate official number transactionally, render immutable PDF, write audit event
send: Email/Telegram/share link optional, audit event recorded
convert: Quotation to invoice/DO, invoice to receipt, invoice adjustment to credit/debit note; preserve source_document_id link
void_cancel: Issued document cannot be deleted; void/cancel requires reason and preserves PDF
payment: Support partial/full payment, method, reference number, paid_at, receipt generation

pdf_and_printing.a4_pdf_engine: HTML/CSS rendered through Playwright/Browsershot Chromium for accurate Excel-like layout and image placement.
pdf_and_printing.template_strategy: Use structured Blade/React-compatible HTML templates per company and document type, not raw Excel generation. Maintain visual match through CSS tokens.
page_sizes: 60mm width thermal receipt PDF for receipt/quick print
pdf_and_printing.immutability: Store final generated PDF and rendered metadata after issue. Re-render only by revision/void/new document, not by silently changing issued PDF.
visual_qa: Artwork page fit and caption check

artwork_attachments.primary_use_case: Wehdah printing/design invoices where artwork/design proof must be appended after the main document.
artwork_attachments.storage: Preserve original uploaded file and generate normalized preview thumbnails.
artwork_attachments.layout: Append one or more A4 pages after main PDF. Use clean grid/table with labels Artwork 1, Artwork 2, etc., confirmation line, and company sign/chop area.

thermal_receipt.format: Separate compact receipt template, not scaled-down A4.
style: no heavy images unless logo is tiny and optional

api_requirements.auth: Laravel Sanctum for first version; token scopes per company and action.
safety: audit log for all API mutations
company permission checks on every request

telegram_bot.mode: Webhook mode integrated with Laravel routes and queues.
telegram_bot.permissions: Whitelist Telegram users and map each user to allowed companies/actions.
ai_assisted_flow: DeepSeek parses into structured draft JSON
System allocates final number and sends PDF
telegram_bot.hard_rule: Telegram can create drafts and previews, but cannot issue without explicit confirmation from an authorized user.

deepseek_ai.role: Optional assistant for parsing/drafting, not source of truth.
deepseek_ai.planned_model: deepseek-v4-pro for highest accuracy when available/configured; allow cheaper fallback model for simple extraction.

einvoice_metadata_ready.scope_v1: Store and validate metadata fields needed for future Malaysia MyInvois integration, but do not submit to MyInvois in v1.
internal_only_documents: payment_voucher unless future rules require otherwise

data_safety: audit trail for all important changes

production_smoke_tests: issue one test document per major template family

implementation_phases.name: Audit closure and missing info confirmation
implementation_phases.acceptance_gate: No unresolved blocker for v1 scaffold.

implementation_phases.name: Scaffold and infrastructure
implementation_phases.acceptance_gate: App boots locally and tests pass.

implementation_phases.name: Company, customers, products, numbering
implementation_phases.acceptance_gate: Per-company numbering tests pass under concurrency.

implementation_phases.name: Document workflows
implementation_phases.acceptance_gate: Feature tests cover main document lifecycle.

implementation_phases.name: PDF and thermal templates
implementation_phases.acceptance_gate: Visual/PDF checks pass and no company brand leaks.

implementation_phases.name: Production deployment
implementation_phases.acceptance_gate: Production smoke and backup verification pass.

missing: whether website should appear on invoices/receipts

acceptance_criteria: All explicitly listed reference files exist inside references folders.
reference-manifest.json contains SHA256, size, source path, copied path, company, category, and audit notes for every reference file.
Main JSON can be read by Claude without needing the chat history.
Main JSON includes locked decisions, audit summary, missing info, architecture, API, Telegram, DeepSeek, e-Invoice metadata, deployment, and test plan.
No old Excel records are treated as production records.
No company template, numbering, or records are mixed across companies.
